title: Stilbenes Group - Canada.ca
content:
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). This screening assessment focuses on 2 of 4 substances referred to collectively as the Stilbenes Group.
- Summary of publications
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
C.I. Fluorescent Brightener 28, disodium salt
Benzenesulfonic acid, 2,2'-(1,2-ethenediyl)bis[5-[[4-[bis(2-hydroxyethyl)amino]-6-(phenylamino)-1,3,5-triazin-2-yl]amino]-, disodium salt
None planned at this time
Fluorescent Brightener FWA-1
Benzenesulfonic acid, 2,2'-(1,2-ethenediyl)bis[5-[[4-(4-morpholinyl)-6-(phenylamino)-1,3,5-triazin-2-yl]amino]-, disodium salt
Publication  of the final screening assessment. The  related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 153,  No. 5 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 151, No. 39 .
Two other substances (CAS RNs 1533-45-5  and 3426-43-5) were identified as being part of the Stilbenes Group at the outset of the third phase of the CMP . These substances were subsequently determined to be of low concern to both human health and the environment, through other approaches. Conclusions for these two substances are provided in the Screening Assessment for the Rapid Screening of Substances with Limited General Population Exposure .
